zh.lifeSummary: 當Christian Beswick於大約1563年出生在英國倫敦時，她的父親Anthony Redshawe8歲，母親Elizabeth8歲。她於大約1583年與Edward Saint Barbe Esquire在英國米德萊可結婚。他們至少是8個兒子和2個女兒的父母。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Christian Beswick于大约1563年出生在英国倫敦时，她的父亲Anthony Redshawe8岁，母亲Elizabeth8岁。她于大约1583年与Edward Saint Barbe Esquire在英国米德萊可结婚。他们至少是8个儿子和2个女儿的父母。

nameMeanings.name: Beswick
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from any of the places in Lancashire and East Yorkshire named Beswick. The second element is Old English wīc ‘outlying (dairy) farm’ (see Wick ). The first element of the Lancashire name may be an Old English personal name Bēac; that of the Yorkshire name is possibly an Old Norse personal name Bōsi or Besi.

variants.name: Wick
meanings: English: from Middle English wik(e) (Old English wīc) ‘building; enclosed piece of land; dependent farm where a certain kind of work is done’. In placenames the term is frequently combined with words associated with food production, as in Butterwick ‘butter wick’, Chiswick ‘cheese wick’, Cowick ‘cow wick’, Hardwick ‘herd wick’, Gatwick ‘goat wick’, Shapwick ‘sheep wick’, Goswick ‘goose wick’, Berwick ‘barley wick’, Fishwick ‘fish wick’. The most common sense is ‘dairy farm’. The surname may be topographic or occupational, denoting someone who lived or worked at a wick (compare Wicker ), or habitational, denoting someone who lived at or came from a place called Wick (of which there are examples in Berkshire, Gloucestershire, Somerset, Wiltshire, and Worcestershire), Wyke (Devon, Dorset, Surrey, Yorkshire), or Week (Cornwall, Devon, Hampshire, Isle of Wight, Somerset).
German: from a medieval personal name Wicko, a short form of any of various ancient Germanic personal names formed with the element wīg ‘battle, war’.
German: habitational name from Wick (Westphalia) or any of the places called Wieck or Wiek.

nameMeanings.name: Christian
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

variants.name: Christianne
meanings: From Latin Christianus ‘follower of Christ’, in use as a given name from the Middle Ages onwards, especially as a girl's name. The name of Christ (Greek Khristos) is a translation of the Hebrew term Messiah ‘anointed’.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When Christian Beswick was born about 1563, in London, England, her father, Anthony Redshawe, was 8 and her mother, Elizabeth, was 8. She married Edward Saint Barbe Esquire about 1583, in Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons and 2 daughters.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Christian Beswick est née environ 1563, à Londres, Angleterre, son père, Anthony Redshawe, avait 8 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth, avait 8 ans. Elle a épousé Edward Saint Barbe Esquire environ 1583, à Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils et 2 filles.

de.lifeSummary: Als Christian Beswick um 1563 in London, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Anthony Redshawe 8 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth 8. Sie hat um 1583 in Middlesex, England Edward Saint Barbe Esquire geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 8 Söhne und 2 Töchter.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Beswick è nata il circa 1563 nel London, England, sua padre, Anthony Redshawe, aveva 8 anni e sua madre, Elizabeth, aveva 8 anni. Lei sposato Edward Saint Barbe Esquire circa 1583, nel Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli e 2 figlie.

ja.lifeSummary: Christian Beswickが約1563年にイギリスロンドンで生まれた時，父Anthony Redshaweは8歳，母Elizabethは8歳であった。約1583年にイギリスミッドレセックスでEdward Saint Barbe Esquireと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。

ko.lifeSummary: Christian Beswick(이)가 대략 1563년 영국 런던에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Anthony Redshawe(은)는 8세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth(은)는 8세였다. 그녀는 대략 1583년 영국 미들레세스에서 Edward Saint Barbe Esquire(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Christian Beswick nasceu aproximadamente 1563, em London, Inglaterra, seu pai, Anthony Redshawe, tinha 8 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth, tinha 8 anos. Ela casou-se com Edward Saint Barbe Esquire aproximadamente 1583, em Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos e 2 filhas.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Christian Beswick родилась около 1563 г. в местности Лондон, Англия, её отцу по имени Anthony Redshawe было 8 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth, 8. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Edward Saint Barbe Esquire около 1583 г. в местности миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей и 2 дочери.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Christian Beswick nació aproximadamente 1563, en London, Inglaterra, su papá, Anthony Redshawe, tenía 8 años y su mamá, Elizabeth, tenía 8 años. Se casó con Edward Saint Barbe Esquire aproximadamente 1583, en Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos y 2 hijas.
